name: rl-dialogue
description: Train dialogue systems using RL with rewards based on task completion and conversation quality.
keywords: dialogue systems, reinforcement learning, conversation, reward modeling, task completion
content:
## Reinforcement Learning for Dialogue Systems

RL allows dialogue systems to optimize task success rather than just next-token prediction.

### Core Concept

RL allows dialogue systems to optimize task success rather than just next-token prediction. This enables efficient model development and deployment.
